texto: When a great adventure is launched with a powerful thrust, fatigue in the muscles and doubts in the mind are swept away by a fullness that moves life along like a breath from the depths of the soul.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Bernard Moitessier: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “When a great adventure is launched with a powerful thrust, fatigue in the muscles and doubts in t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, adventure, sailing pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de sailing.
